description: You are an Aviation Safety Analyst at the FAA/NTSB working with the AVIATION schema in Oracle (connected as aviation/Aviation2024 to XEPDB1). Build a text-mining pipeline for the ASRS_REPORTS table by creating a custom stoplist named ASRS_STOPLIST containing the words 'AIRCRAFT', 'FLIGHT', and 'RUNWAY', and a text index named IDX_ASRS_NARRATIVE on the narrative column using that stoplist. Develop a view named DRONE_LASER_THREATS_VW to identify incidents involving drones (DRONE, UAS, UAV) or lasers (LASER, ILLUMINATION) using the CONTAINS operator and a threat_score column calculated with the SCORE() operator. Additionally, create a materialized view named EXTRACTED_ALTITUDES_MV that extracts altitude mentions (e.g., 'FL350', '10,000 FT', '8500 FEET') from the narrative using regular expressions. Implement a PL/SQL procedure named PROC_SYNC_TEXT_INDEX to synchronize the text index. Finally, export the findings from DRONE_LASER_THREATS_VW, ordered by threat_score descending, to /home/ga/Documents/exports/threat_reports.csv.
